theme.fileTypes: PNG, JPG or WebP up to 5MB
theme.sidebarScrimInfo: Improves sidebar text contrast on wallpaper. If text readability is poor in Light mode, try increasing the scrim intensity.
theme.welcomeGreetingReadabilityInfo: Controls text color adaptation for the homepage welcome greeting when wallpaper is enabled. Use this if the greeting is hard to read in Light mode.
theme.messageGlassEffectInfo: Enabling this adds a glass effect. It may impact performance on low-end devices.
theme.fileTooLarge: Image size must be 5MB or less
theme.imageLoadFailed: Image loading failed, please try again
theme.customColorDescription: Adjusting color or transparency will switch to the custom theme.
theme.surfaceOpacityInfo: Controls transparency for chat cards, title bars, and composer.

index.title: Theme Settings
index.description: Customize Gemini's color theme to match your style.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm Action
confirmDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?

updated.title: Extension Updated
updated.body: $1 has been updated. Please reload this page to continue using the extension.
